subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which Thou didst create the world and subdue the nations, to make me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به خلقت العالم و سخرت الامم بان تجعلنی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
